title: Doom Sounds for Zombie Awareness
description: Replaces the investigation and alert sounds for Zombie Awareness.
body:
This resource pack makes certain mobs sound more vicious when investigating and/or getting alerted with using sounds from the Zombiemen from Classic Doom. It also changes the subtitles given.

Demonstration:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Qy7GA9VMkT4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
Sounds by id Software
  
Zombie Awareness mod by Corosus



Pack icon:

Background image from [Not Enough Trials](https://modrinth.com/datapack/not-enough-trials) by Danmatisk

Zombie image taken from The Minecraft Wiki

Text generated with [Ceevee's Doom Text Generator](https://c.eev.ee/doom-text-generator/#text=Zombie%3A+me+see+you&font=doom-small&scale=6&kerning=0&line-spacing=0&padding=0&escapee-mode=expand&equal-lines=on&align=0.5&syntax=none&custom1a=%23000000&custom1c=%23ffffff&translation=green)
</details>
